commands: if docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 test -d /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites/frontend; then echo 'Site frontend already exists'; else docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench new-site frontend --no-mariadb-socket --admin-password '$ADMIN_PASSWORD' --mariadb-root-password '$DB_ROOT_PASSWORD'"; fi
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend install-app erpnext || true"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend migrate"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench use frontend"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend set-config host_name https://karavanimports.com"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend add-domain karavanimports.com || true"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend add-domain erpnext-prod-alb-1243208729.us-east-1.elb.amazonaws.com || true"
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc "bench --site frontend add-domain 100.57.63.224 || true"
